name: Flesh of the Pig Ala Bob Greenberg
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Country Ribs or other (regular old supermarket pork)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into evenly thick pieces, removing any excess fat.
2. In a large baking pan, soak the ribs with cider vinegar.
3. Sprinkle the ribs with garlic salt and black pepper on all sides.
4. Cook over a moderate hot fire, turning often, until browned but not burned.
5. Use hickory chips to add flavor; keep them feeding into the charcoal.
6. Remove from heat when trichina danger is past (meat turns brown).
7. Serve immediately. Optionally, reheat with the sauce or in an oven at 325°F for 15-20 minutes.
Special Purpose Sauce:
1 bottle Open Pit
1/4 cup Molasses
Reheat by slow boiling until warm; avoid eating cold as it's unpleasant.
